title: centaurea integrans
intro: Centaurea integrans, also known as Centaurea cineraria, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots are used in herbal medicine, where they are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Centaurea integrans have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to aid in the management of various health conditions.
